name: PHIGHTING! but shorter
description:

CREDITS

.

NOTES

All my bots will have # as an OOC instruction. So messages that start with it will be the bots instruction OOC. You should probably use this if you want to direct something in RP forcibly.

Why do all PHIGHTING! bots make just... a quote in the beginning of their character bio? It's actually so corny 66% of the time XD
